entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Vprašaj mi vprašanja preden nego kar mi razložiš previše."

entries.source: "Business English words"
entries.value: "Besede poslovne angleščine"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Preveri moj odgovor preden nego kar daš svoj."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Daj mi težu verziju nakon kar pokušam."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Držite ga početnički prijatelj."

entries.source: "SAT vocabulary"
entries.value: "Besedišče za SAT"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Koristite primere iz mog ispita, projekta ali svakodnevnog života."

entries.source: "Words about weather"
entries.value: "Besede o vremenu"

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: UI upiti

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi naloga.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Komunikacija

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Završite z rekapom koju sami napišete.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Za ta način rada, posao je jednostavan: Ustvariti rječnik z značenjem, primerima, izgovorni znakovi, memorijske kuke, in brza praksa.

entries.source: For Vocabulary Builder, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Za Vocabulary Builder, korisna praksa petlja je:

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Dobri poticaji obično uključuju tri stvari: temu, vašu trenutnu razinu, in vrstu pomoči koju želite. Ne trebate savršeni tekst. Treba vam samo dovoljno konteksta za početak seje.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Ako se odgovor osječa preširoko, suziti ga. Vprašajte za jedan primer, jednu ponapako, jedno vprašanje provjere, ali jedan sljedeči korak. Ako se osječa previše lako, vprašajte za izazov. Ako se osječa previše teško, vprašajte za most iz onoga kar več znate.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Učini izlaz korisnijim

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Ideje za pozive in ponovljiva učna zanka za koristne učne rezultate z načinom Vocabulary Builder na inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Čitanje UI odgovor nije isti kao učenje. Nakon prvog odgovora, vprašajte način da učinite nekar z tom idejom.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Ptezane putanje učenja

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Zahtijevati povratnu informaciju z one strane ki se osječala nesigurno.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Odgovorite preden nego zatražite rješenje.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Započni z jednim čistim zahtjevom

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Navedite cilj v jednoj rečenici.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: spretnosti učenja

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Ta završna rekapa je važna. Ko razložite ideju natrag, otkrivate kar je čvrsto in kar je još uvijek posudženo od UI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for vocabulary builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Najbolje seje učenja su prilagodžene. Ovaj način je podešen za graditelja rječnika z vlastitim poticajima, primerima in protokom učenja.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Vocabulary Builder is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Najhitrejši način, da iz Vocabulary Builder dobiš vrednost, je, da UI podaš učno nalogo, ne samo teme. Tema pove, kaj te zanima. Učna naloga pove, kakšno pomoč potrebuješ.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Zatim dodajte ograničenje ki čini sesiju više osebnim:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Probajte jedan od teh početaka:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Preobrati način rada v praksu

entries.source: Use Vocabulary Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Reading Companion. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Vocabulary Builder, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Reading Companion. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Vocabulary Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Vocabulary Builder
